name: Real Estate Closing Intake
description: Real estate closing intake for real estate attorneys, title agents, and closing coordinators preparing for a residential or commercial real estate closing. Evaluates the transaction structure, title status, lien clearance, survey issues, closing condition satisfaction, and funding requirements to produce a closing intake profile with pre-closing checklist and issue flags. Not legal advice.

privacy.disclosure: A summary of this session will be available for review.
